settings.content:
We want you to be happy with your purchase. If something isn’t quite right, here’s how returns, refunds, and exchanges work for orders shipped to Australia

Important Information:

  • Return Window: 30 days from the delivery date
  • Restocking Fee: None
  • Refund Timeline: Processed within 7 days after we receive your return
  • Return Shipping Costs: Customer is responsible for return postage


This policy is subject to our Terms of Service

settings.title: Step 1 -Contact Us:
settings.content: Email support@millermelbourne.com with your order number and reason for the return. Returns without prior approval will not be processed.

settings.title: Step 2 - Follow Our Instructions:
settings.content: Once your return is approved, we’ll provide you with the necessary shipping details and return instructions.

settings.title: Step 3 - Package Carefully:
settings.content: Pack the item securely to avoid damage during transit.

settings.title: Note:
settings.content: Return shipping costs are the responsibility of the customer.

Return Eligibility
You can return eligible items within 30 days of delivery. To initiate a return, please contact us at support@millermelbourne.com. Items must be unused, unworn, and returned in their original packaging with all original tags attached. Returns requested after the 30-day period will not be accepted.

settings.title: Refunds
settings.content: Once we receive and inspect your returned item, we will issue a refund to your original payment method. This process typically takes up to 7 days. No restocking fees will be applied.

settings.title: Exchanges
settings.content: If you would like to exchange an item, please contact us at support@millermelbourne.com with the details of your request. We’ll assist you with the exchange process.

settings.title: Order Cancellations
settings.content: If you need to cancel your order, reach out to us at support@millermelbourne.com as soon as possible. We’ll do our best to accommodate your request, but please note that cancellations cannot be guaranteed once the order has started processing.

settings.title: Items Damaged or Incorrect?
settings.content: If your order arrives damaged or incorrect, please send a photo and details to support@millermelbourne.com . We’ll make arrangements to send you a replacement or the correct item as soon as possible.

settings.liquid:
Questions, thoughts, or anything in between, we’re just a message away. Reach out using the contact details below, and we’ll be ready to assist.
